summary: Do not register the json-spec/yaml-spec promoted commands (kept as _ = newXCmd suppression).
reason: USDA /v1/json-spec and /v1/yaml-spec serve the API's own OpenAPI document, not nutrition data; yaml-spec returns non-JSON that breaks agent JSON expectations and dogfood.
validated_outcome: Commands absent from help and MCP; live dogfood 83/83 clean.
